       COUNT(cs.id) AS total_sections,
       (COUNT(cs.id)::double precision / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT p.id), 0)) AS avg_sections_per_professor
FROM public.professors p

data.department_name: Wydział Informatyki i Nauki o Materiałach

visualization.title: Average Sections per Professor by Department

resultRaw.sql:
SELECT d.id AS department_id,
       d.name AS department_name,
       COUNT(DISTINCT p.id) AS professor_count,
       COUNT(cs.id) AS total_sections,
       (COUNT(cs.id)::double precision / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT p.id), 0)) AS avg_sections_per_professor
FROM public.professors p
JOIN public.departments d ON p.department_id = d.id
LEFT JOIN public.course_sections cs ON cs.professor_id = p.id
GROUP BY d.id, d.name
ORDER BY d.name;

sample.department_name: Wydział Informatyki i Nauki o Materiałach

issues: Departments with no professors will be omitted because the query starts FROM professors and INNER JOINs departments. If you want empty departments included, start FROM departments and LEFT JOIN professors/course_sections.
If professor_count = 0 the avg_sections_per_professor expression yields NULL (due to NULLIF); bars will be missing for those departments—use COALESCE(..., 0) if you prefer showing 0.
Vega-Lite encoding does not include an explicit x-axis sort; relying on the SQL ORDER BY may work but is not guaranteed in all renderers. Add an explicit sort if a stable ordering is required.

data.department_name: Wydział Informatyki i Nauki o Materiałach

visualization.title: Average Sections per Professor by Department

result.sql:
SELECT d.id AS department_id,
       d.name AS department_name,
       COUNT(DISTINCT p.id) AS professor_count,
       COUNT(cs.id) AS total_sections,
       (COUNT(cs.id)::double precision / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT p.id), 0)) AS avg_sections_per_professor
FROM public.professors p
JOIN public.departments d ON p.department_id = d.id
LEFT JOIN public.course_sections cs ON cs.professor_id = p.id
GROUP BY d.id, d.name
ORDER BY d.name;

sample.department_name: Wydział Informatyki i Nauki o Materiałach

issues: Departments with no professors will be omitted because the query starts FROM professors and INNER JOINs departments. If you want empty departments included, start FROM departments and LEFT JOIN professors/course_sections.
If professor_count = 0 the avg_sections_per_professor expression yields NULL (due to NULLIF); bars will be missing for those departments—use COALESCE(..., 0) if you prefer showing 0.
Vega-Lite encoding does not include an explicit x-axis sort; relying on the SQL ORDER BY may work but is not guaranteed in all renderers. Add an explicit sort if a stable ordering is required.
